title: ferray-ufunc: no matmul/vecdot/matvec ufuncs (gufuncs)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy 2.0 includes matmul, vecdot, matvec, vecmat as ufuncs with generalized ufunc (gufunc) signatures like '(m,k),(k,n)->(m,n)'. These support batched operation and broadcasting over leading dimensions. ferray has ferray-linalg for matrix operations, but there are no gufunc-style operations in ferray-ufunc that automatically batch over leading dimensions. Research whether a gufunc abstraction (with signature-based shape inference) would be valuable for ferray.
